description_long: This rifle features a long, tapered wooden stock with a smooth, dark brown finish, extending nearly the full length of the firearm. The barrel is slender and black, protruding from the front, with a small orange tip at the muzzle, likely for safety or training purposes. A black detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, and a red trigger guard adds a distinct visual accent. The rear of the stock is capped with a metallic or rubber buttplate, and the overall design is streamlined with minimal external attachments. The rifle appears to have basic iron sights, with no scope or advanced optics mounted. The combination of wood and metal gives it a classic, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or civilian use.
description: A long, classic rifle with a dark wooden stock, black barrel, detachable magazine, and red trigger guard, featuring iron sights and an orange muzzle tip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden stock, black barrel, detachable magazine, and red trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel, orange muzzle tip, and the tapering of the wooden stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the magazine and trigger guard visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the metallic or rubber buttplate and the tapering of the stock towards the barrel.
